expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
Sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with subject **"Top error"** and body:

> **OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events**

This is the unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count: **SENTRY-3029**, **4,665 events**, project `search`.

data: {"value":{"name":"sentry_issues","description":"Sentry error groups. UPDATE (WHERE id=…) SET status='resolved' resolves an issue.","volatility":"stable","ops":["read","update!"],"columns":[{"name":"id","type":"text"},{"name":"title","type":"text"},{"name":"culprit","type":"text"},{"name":"level","ty…(+567)

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [unresolved (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})
      top (apply max-key :count unresolved)]
  (def top-issue top)
  (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body (:title top)})
  top)"}

{"code":"(let [unresolved (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})
      top (apply max-key :count unresolved)]
  (def top-issue top)
  (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body (:title top)})
  top)"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [unresolved (sentry_issues {:status "unresolved"})
      top (last (sort-by :count unresolved))]
  (def top-issue top)
  (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :subject "Top error" :body (:title top)})
  top)"}
